title: statusline output
description: Output schema for the statusline method (install, uninstall, and status subcommands manage the Claude Code statusLine relay).

subcommand.description: Discriminator field identifying this as a status response.

installed.description: Whether the atrium statusLine relay is currently installed.

subcommand.description: Discriminator field identifying this as an install response.

installed.description: Whether the statusLine relay was successfully installed.

subcommand.description: Discriminator field identifying this as an uninstall response.

uninstalled.description: Whether the statusLine relay was successfully uninstalled.
